about.get_help_description: Visit the official website of Microsoft PC Manager for more help and support.
about.get_help_message: You will be redirected to the official website of Microsoft PC Manager. Please contact us from the More Contact section at the bottom of the website for help.
about.official_website_description: Visit the official website of Microsoft PC Manager for the latest information, updates, and support.

privacy_policy_content.1: MSPCManagerHelper (hereinafter referred to as "the Software") does not collect or upload any data in any form, including but not limited to computer identifiers, geolocation information, etc. The Software itself does not actively collect any user data. While you use the Software, Microsoft® Windows® Operating System, Microsoft PC Manager, or other third-party software may collect data; such collection is unrelated to this Software. If future versions introduce any telemetry, crash reporting, or user data upload features, Developer will clearly state this in the update log and provide an option to disable it or obtain your explicit consent.
privacy_policy_content.2: When you access certain links (e.g., https://learn.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=studentamb_474966), a Microsoft Student Ambassador identifier is used to help Developer count visitor numbers. When you visit the relevant URLs, all tracking services are performed by Microsoft, and Developer does not receive any personally identifiable information.
privacy_policy_content.title: MSPCManagerHelper Privacy Policy

term_of_use_content.title: MSPCManagerHelper Terms of Use
term_of_use_content.1_body: This Software is developed by individual developer GuCATs (hereinafter referred to as "Developer") and is open-sourced under the MIT License. Anyone may freely use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and sell copies of this Software for any purpose, including commercial use, provided that the original copyright notice and permission notice are retained.
term_of_use_content.2_body: If you distribute or reference this Software, we recommend that you also provide the original download URL of this project: https://github.com/Goo-aw233/MSPCManagerHelper, so that other users may obtain the latest version.
term_of_use_content.3_body: This Software is provided for learning and research purposes only. Developer does not warrant that the functionality of this Software will meet your requirements, nor that the operation of the Software will be entirely error-free. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Developer shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of the use or inability to use this Software. THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTY.
term_of_use_content.4_body: Even if Developer has been advised of the possibility of such damages, Developer shall not be liable for any claims arising from the use or performance of this Software. If you are dissatisfied with any portion of this Software, your sole remedy is to stop using and delete the Software.
term_of_use_content.5_body: This Software and all its contents (including but not limited to text, images, icons, interfaces, code, and trademarks) are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. Developer retains full copyright in its independently created content. Other contributors (including but not limited to translations, code, documentation) retain their respective copyrights, and all contributions are licensed to the public under the MIT License. The MIT License does not grant you the right to use Developer's name, project name, or trademarks for promotional or endorsement purposes. All rights not expressly granted by the MIT License are reserved by Developer.
term_of_use_content.6_body: Developer fully respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. For details on how we collect, use, and protect your information, please refer to our Privacy Policy.
term_of_use_content.7_body:
This Software uses the following third-party open-source components. Please comply with their respective licenses:
- NSudo: https://github.com/M2Team/NSudo
- Sysinternals: https://learn.microsoft.com/sysinternals/license-terms/?wt.mc_id=studentamb_474966
For the complete third-party license notices, see: https://github.com/Goo-aw233/MSPCManagerHelper/blob/main/ThirdPartyNotices.txt
term_of_use_content.8_body: Nothing in these Terms shall be construed to restrict or add additional restrictions to the rights granted by the MIT License. If any conflict exists between these Terms and the MIT License, the MIT License shall prevail. If you have any questions regarding these Terms, please contact Developer.
term_of_use_content.preface: Welcome to MSPCManagerHelper (hereinafter referred to as "the Software"). Please read the following Terms of Use (hereinafter referred to as "these Terms") carefully before using the Software. By downloading, installing, or using the Software, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, please exit the Software and delete it. We may update these Terms from time to time, but any updates will not restrict or revoke the rights you have already obtained under the MIT License.

common.canceled_operation: The operation was canceled by the user.
common.events_textbox_description: All events will be logged here; the right-click context menu can be used to copy or clear the content.
common.executing_operation_prompt: Please wait for the operation to complete. If the operation is unresponsive for a long time, or the application is not responding, please end the application from Task Manager.
common.offline_image_description: An offline image of Windows that is not the current system, usually a directory of an installed Windows or a directory of a mounted Windows image.

help.get_help_preface: If you encounter any issues while using the application, please visit the following resources for help and support.
help.params_1_body: Use the /? or /h or /help parameter to open the help window.
help.params_2_body: Use the /devmode parameter to enable developer mode, which will enable some advanced features (For example, take ownership) for developers to use.
help.params_3_body: Use the /debugmode parameter to enable debug mode, which will enable additional logging for troubleshooting purposes, and will have the same permissions as developer mode.
help.params_4_body: Use the /bypasschecks parameter to bypass startup checks, which will disable all startup check items when enabled.
help.params_5_body:
Use the /locale=<Language Code> or /locale:<Language Code> parameter to specify the application's display language, for example, /locale=en-US to specify the use of English (United States). If the specified language is not supported, the application will automatically fall back to the system language or English (United States).
Supported language codes:
en-US: English (United States)
zh-CN: 中文 (简体)
zh-TW: 中文 (繁体)
help.params_preface:
Run the Application with Parameters:
All parameters support the /, -, or -- forms, such as /?, -?, and --?. The following examples all use /?.
All parameters are not case-sensitive, and can be combined, such as /devmode /locale=en-US.
help.preface: Welcome to MSPCManagerHelper, this is the application's help window.
help.title: Help Window

home.cleanup_after_exit_description: Clean up any possible residues after exiting the application.
home.current_system_meets_system_requirements: The current system meets the minimum system requirements for Microsoft PC Manager.

home.long_paths_description: Enable support for file paths longer than 260 characters.
home.mspcm_beta_version_is: Microsoft PC Manager Public Beta Version
home.restart_as_administrator_description: Restart the application with administrator privileges to enable all features.
home.start_mspcm_beta: Start Microsoft PC Manager Public Beta
home.welcome_message: Welcome to MSPCManagerHelper! This tool is designed to help you manage Microsoft PC Manager. Please select a feature from the navigation menu to continue. Before using MSPCManagerHelper, please read the 'Terms of Use' and 'Privacy Policy' thoroughly. By continuing to use, you agree to these terms.

settings.app_display_language_description: The display language of the application, all interface text will be displayed in this language.
settings.appearance_description: Choose your preferred application display style.
settings.compatibility_mode_description: Use legacy Windows commands to improve compatibility, but may reduce the performance of some features. Some commands may be deprecated.
settings.follow_system_font_settings_description: Use the system's current font settings instead of following the application's font settings.
settings.original_links_description: Use original links instead of redirected links when accessing external links.
settings.reload_ui_description: Reload the user interface to apply changes that cannot be applied immediately.
settings.privacy_settings_description: Open the Privacy & Security in Windows Settings, where you can manage application permissions and other privacy settings.
settings.support_developer_description: Add contributor ID when accessing Microsoft links to support developer analytics.
settings.take_ownership_description: Take full administrator privileges to execute commands.
settings.use_internal_viewer_description: Use the application's built-in file viewer to open log files instead of the system's default application.
